healing_potion.name: Healing Potion
healing_potion.description: A small vial filled with a bubbling red liquid. It restores 50 health when used.

strength_tonic.name: Strength Tonic
strength_tonic.description: A small vial filled with a glowing blue liquid. It increases attack by 10 for 3 turns when used.

max_healing_potion.name: Max Healing Potion
max_healing_potion.description: A large vial filled with a shimmering golden ambrosia. It fully restores health when used.

defense_tonic.name: Defense Tonic
defense_tonic.description: A small vial filled with a glowing green liquid. It increases defense by 10 for 3 turns when used.

demons_mark.name: Demon's Mark
demons_mark.description: A cursed amulet that increases attack by 20 but reduces health by 25% when equipped.

iron_sword.name: Iron Sword
iron_sword.description: A sturdy iron sword that increases attack by 5 when equipped.

tiers.name: Tempered Sword
tiers.description: Your blade has tasted blood most foul. Attack increased by 1.

tiers.name: What if I don't want to be a sword?!
tiers.description: The sword is going through a phase... Attack increased by 1.

tiers.name: Wraith Blade
tiers.description: The sword binds to your soul. Attack increased by 1.

bicycle_helmet.name: Bicycle Helmet
bicycle_helmet.description: A bicycle helmet...really? O-okay, it increases defense by 2 when equipped, but you feel dumb.

kevlar_suit.name: Kevlar Suit
kevlar_suit.description:
What style? [3mItalian.[0m How many buttons? [3mTwo.[0m Trousers? [3mTapered.[0m How about the lining? [3mTactical.[0m

Increases defense by 2.

corduroy_pants.name: Corduroy Pants
corduroy_pants.description:
They're itchy, but your mom likes them.

Increases defense by 1.

grimoire.name: Grimoire
grimoire.description: An ancient tome filled with arcane knowledge. It allows you to decipher and cast spells.

researchers_journal.name: Researcher's Journal
researchers_journal.description: An old, leather-bound journal filled with notes and sketches about the experiments conducted in the occult laboratory.
researchers_journal.content:
Day 14: Experiments are progessing, but at great cost to the staff. Beyond physical injuries, some have started to show signs of mental instability.

Day 27: The latest injection showed promise; Subject 42 has developed enhanced strength and agility, but is now completely unresponsive to stimuli.

Day 28: Subject 42 has dissappeared and lockdown procedures are in effect. Someone please help me...

boss_key.name: Death's Icon
boss_key.description: A heavy, ornate impression of a skull, made of blackened iron. It looks like it fits in something.
